subcodes.first_line: O my solitary beloved! I swear by thy precious soul and by thy mind full of wisdom and discernment that I have not a moment's respite through the night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب وحید من بجان عزیز و سر پر عقل و تمیزت قسم که نفسی فرصت ندارم تمام شب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
